articles.title_en: Ukraine Hits Russian Oil Sites as 8 Killed in Both Countries
articles.lead_en: Ukraine said Sunday it had hit several Russian ships as both sides fired hundreds of drones.
articles.title_raw: Ukraine Hits Russian Oil Sites as 8 Killed in Both Countries
articles.lead_raw: Ukraine said Sunday it had hit several Russian ships as both sides fired hundreds of drones.

articles.title_en: In some areas of Russia, barbecue cooking may be prohibited.
articles.lead_en: The ban may be temporarily introduced in the event of an increase in fire danger, the Russian Ministry of Emergency Situations emphasized.
articles.title_raw: На отдельных территориях России приготовление шашлыков могут запретить
articles.lead_raw: Запрет могут временно ввести в случае повышения пожарной опасности, подчеркнули в МЧС РФ
